description: Main learning videos for understanding multiplication patterns with multiples of 10, 100, and 1000, including strategies for quick mental calculation

videos.title: Multiplying by multiples of 10 | Multiplication and division | Arithmetic | Khan Academy
videos.description: Learn how to multiply numbers by 10, 20, 50, and 100. Discover the pattern: multiplying by multiples of 10 is just like multiplying by single digits and adding zeros. Great for transport and real-life calculations!
learningObjectives: Multiply any number by 10, 20, 50, and 100 using place value patterns
Understand why multiplying by 10 shifts digits one place to the left
Apply the pattern to solve transport context problems quickly

questions.question: A train travels 50 km in one hour. How far does it travel in 6 hours?

standard.description: For students who scored >= 80% on readiness
